calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Plaintiffs Motion To Set Aside The Notice Of Conditional Settlement And Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Aug-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. VIVIAN LEUNG LERCHE, TEL. NO. 1-415-680-5731 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC''S Motion To Set Aside The Notice Of Conditional Settlement And Enforce Settlement Agreement is Granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and judgment. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg
